highlights.text: Dubai (3N) → Abu Dhabi (2N) classic UAE family circuit
Burj Khalifa, desert safari & Dubai Marina evening
Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque & Louvre Abu Dhabi

itinerary.title: Dubai Abu Dhabi Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Dubai • Abu Dhabi • Burj Khalifa • Sheikh Zayed Mosque • Ferrari World
itinerary.overview: Embark on an unforgettable UAE journey with TRAGUIN's curated family itinerary. Blending the futuristic pulse of Dubai with the cultural grandeur of Abu Dhabi, this tour offers a seamless mix of excitement and heritage — ensuring unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: UAE-002 | Dubai Abu Dhabi Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days UAE family package (UAE-002): Dubai city tour, desert safari, Sheikh Zayed Mosque, Louvre Abu Dhabi, and Ferrari World.

days.title: Arrival in Dubai
days.description: Your TRAGUIN family tour begins with a VIP airport welcome. A private luxury van transfers you to your premium hotel. Enjoy a relaxing evening by the Dubai Marina, admiring the breathtaking landscapes of the illuminated city.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport welcome, private luxury van transfer
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Dubai City Exploration
days.description: Explore the best of Dubai. Visit the iconic Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Mall, and Palm Jumeirah. This curated experience offers deep insights into Dubai's luxury living and iconic attractions.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah city tour

days.title: Desert Safari & Transfer to Abu Dhabi
days.description: Experience an adrenaline-filled desert safari before driving to Abu Dhabi. The scenic beauty of the shifting sands sets the stage for a memorable transition to the capital.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Desert safari, scenic drive to Abu Dhabi
Overnight Stay: Abu Dhabi (Luxury Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Desert BBQ Dinner

days.title: Abu Dhabi Cultural Immersion
days.description: Visit the stunning Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque and Louvre Abu Dhabi. This immersive experience brings together global art and breathtaking cultural beauty.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Louvre Abu Dhabi
Overnight Stay: Abu Dhabi (Luxury Family Hotel)

days.title: Ferrari World & Family Thrills
days.description: A day of excitement at Ferrari World. Experience speed, luxury, and exclusive experiences designed for the whole family, leaving you with unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Ferrari World full-day visit
Overnight Stay: Abu Dhabi (Luxury Family Hotel)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN assisted transfer to the airport. Your classic Dubai Abu Dhabi tour concludes with lasting memories.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked premium family hotels across Dubai and Abu Dhabi
Dubai city tour — Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall & Palm Jumeirah
Desert safari with transfer to Abu Dhabi
Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque and Louvre Abu Dhabi visit
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and UAE entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
